microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **0→1 resilience automation platform** from a 2-person operation into a self-service experiment tracking system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 product discovery** for an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling primitives that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a fully scalable, reproducible model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new framework for continuous validation at scale.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, aligning engineering, infra, and GTM stakeholders throughout.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring experiment-style planning workflows to cut cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, establishing reusable automation primitives adopted across the resilience org.

Defined packaging and positioning for early customer programs with Databricks and NetApp, translating ambiguous infrastructure workflows into **clear product APIs** and runbooks that accelerated partner onboarding and reduced integration friction.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation workflows**, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly by integrating LLM-powered tooling into developer pipelines.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by leading 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical experiment workflow gaps and translating research-oriented needs into actionable product primitives.

Improved data lineage and artifact retrieval by implementing metadata standards and migrating docs to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and laying groundwork for reproducible, explainable developer workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ engineering and infrastructure teams across Azure.

Executed 0→1 product discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — mirroring experiment tracking best practices for reproducible, scalable execution.

Engineered a **Power BI observability dashboard** tracking operational toil and artifact gaps across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation opportunities and prioritize high-impact infrastructure investments with usage-data precision.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the OS migration strategy, mapping artifact dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and establishing reproducible rollout workflows adopted as the standard deployment model.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize developer intake — translating ambiguous infrastructure pain points into clear, shippable product primitives.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and reducing manual intervention in artifact versioning and release workflows.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, designing a CRM-based process that served as the operational backbone for go-to-market execution and early customer programs.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first GTM strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile to sharpen positioning and improve top-of-funnel performance in a competitive market.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks, delivering data-driven recommendations that informed packaging decisions and validated unit-economics assumptions.
